channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kyndryl’s stock tumbles more than 50%. Here’s what’s gone wrong at the IT provider.
item.description: Shares lose more than half their value Monday following the disclosure of an accounting investigation and a big reset of the company’s financial guida...

item.title: Workday’s stock falls as CEO change sounds like ‘really bad news’ to this analyst
item.description: Investor sentiment toward software stocks is low, and now Workday is replacing a CEO who was known for having good sales relationships.

item.title: Micron’s stock falls on fears about Nvidia’s new chips, but investors may be overreacting
item.description: Some investors have been worried about Micron’s role serving Nvidia’s forthcoming chip lineup, but one analyst says he still likes the company’s posit...

item.title: Is the U.S. economy creating any jobs? Is inflation really slowing? Investors are about to find out.
item.description: Investors will get twin reports this week on employment and consumer prices. They’ll help set the stage for when the Fed cuts interest rates this year...

item.title: Alphabet’s $15 billion bond deal may have a highly unusual component
item.description: As tech companies look to finance their hefty spending plans, they’ve been offering bonds with longer maturities.

item.title: Josh Brown's 'HALO' stocks: They can't be disrupted by AI and will get more profitable because of it
item.description: HALO stocks are heavy assets, low obsolescence. They have risks, but not AI risks. In fact, in many cases, AI will probably enable them to become even...

item.title: Three software earnings reports this week could trigger a bounce, says Jay Woods
item.description: Investor and trader Jay Woods breaks down the week ahead for Pro subscribers.

item.title: Fivespan brings amicable activism to Appian in a bid to lift the share price and build value
item.description: The activist firm prefers to take a "behind the scenes" approach when it works with a portfolio company.

item.title: Big Tech's gigantic AI spending plans are spooking investors. But history shows that's when you want to buy
item.description: The recent pullback in megacaps could prove a buying opportunity so long as the companies' growth remains attractive.

item.title: Morgan Stanley says these two stocks will more than double as they pivot from bitcoin to data centers
item.description: A pair of bitcoin-linked firms could see their shares skyrocket, even as the flagship crypto retreats, due to their pivot to the data center business.

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...

item.title: FIGR Stock Jumps Big on Blockchain Lending Wave
item.description: Discover why Figure Technology Solutions (FIGR) surged 21.67% today amid blockchain advancements like $YLDS and RWA Consortium. Learn trading lessons,...
